description: Renovate manages the npm (package.json), Bundler (Gemfile) and GitHub Actions dependencies for this Jekyll site.

Auto-merge: minor and patch updates are merged automatically via GitHub's native auto-merge (platformAutomerge) once the required CI checks pass — no manual triage. MAJOR updates are excluded and stay manual, matching the christianjbrown/* Cloud Run function repos, because a major bump warrants a manual spike.

packageRules.description: Keep major updates manual — they need review before merging.
